---
title: "Samridhi's Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://samridhipurohit.github.io/diabetes-risk-dashboard/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Diabetes Risk Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>This interactive flexdashboard was created for DATA 555 using the CDC BRFSS 2015 health indicators dataset. It explores patterns in diabetes risk across demographic, behavioral, and health-related factors using interactive visualizations designed for a general public health audience.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/samridhipurohit/breast_cancer_wisconsin_diagnostic" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Breast Cancer Wisconsin Diagnostic Project</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>This project uses the Breast Cancer Wisconsin Diagnostic dataset to compare tumor characteristics associated with benign and malignant diagnoses. The analysis summarizes key cell nucleus measurements from digitized fine-needle aspirate images and presents results through a reproducible R Markdown report.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

</div>
